title: ドキドキフルーツフェス

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I visit the cafe one day to find Mejiro Ryan and
Ines Fujin sneaking around in an unusual manner.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, geez... Is McQueen gonna be okay?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Come on, you can do it! Stay positive!

text_block_list.name: Ryan & Ines
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Shhh! Come over here, quickly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan pulls me into the shadows, where
they're both hiding. After getting my bearings, I
follow their gaze to see...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: This fruit is remarkably juicy! I'm amazed!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Yes, the results are beyond what I'd imagined. I'm
grateful to you for conducting the preliminary
research, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, it was nothing elaborate, really. Besides, I
wanted to express my thanks to you for sharing
your knowledge with me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
McQueen invited Ikuno out today so she could
thank her for all her help.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ikuno was super excited for them both to eat a
bunch of delicious desserts at this seasonal fruit
dessert festival.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But McQueen's crazy nervous! And I was so
worried about her that I just couldn't stay put!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: We can't abandon her in her moment of need!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I happened to spot her while at my part-time job,
and I thought maybe there's something I can do
to help!
choice_data_list: She seems to be having fun, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
No, look carefully! Her expression is slightly stiff.
I bet she's thinking stuff like...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(I invited Ikuno to this dessert festival on a whim
because I liked the sound of it, but is she actually
enjoying herself?!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(Perhaps we should have gone someplace else,
like that cleat store she likes?!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: (The whole point of this outing was to thank her, after all!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's definitely what she's thinking! There's no
doubt in my mind!
choice_data_list: The Mejiro bond is nothing to sniff at...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I want to boost McQueen's confidence somehow!
Isn't there anything we can do?!
choice_data_list: Let's utilize your position at your part-time job!
Let's help by using the Mejiro bond.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It's my time to shine, huh? Gotcha! I'll talk to the
boss and see if we can offer them some special
service!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, Ines! Put on this disguise! There's
sunglasses, a wig, and a mask... This way you can
serve them in secret!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Thanks! All right, here I go!

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Server
text_block_list.text:
Thanks a whole bunch for waiting. Here's your
jumbo parfait for two.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Hm? I don't believe we ordered this.

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Server
text_block_list.text:
This is a special item we're offering as part of the
fruit festival. It's on the house.

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Server
text_block_list.text:
It's fairly large, so if you hope to finish it all,
you'll definitely need to spoon-feed it to each
other!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Spoon-feed?!

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Server
text_block_list.text: Yes, spoon-feed. Enjoy. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Sp-sp-spoon... Spoon-feed?! Like, while saying
"open wide"? Is that what she meant?!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: McQueen...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Say "ahh."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Uh?! A-aaahh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chomp.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Mmm... ♪

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: How does it taste?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Uh, hmm... The sweetness is filling my mouth...
And I'm getting a warm feeling deep down in my
chest!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Truly? I never realized you had such a fondness
for desserts. I'm glad you like it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There was probably nothing to worry about in the
first place, but it's nice that Ikuno Dictus appears
to be having a great time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Understood! For McQueen, I'll work myself to the
bone!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'll go borrow a uniform from my boss!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! I've also got some sunglasses and a wig I
can use to disguise myself. Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Incognito Employee
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me, valued customers, but today we're
offering coupons to everyone attending the fruit
festival.

text_block_list.name: Incognito Employee
text_block_list.text:
Here's a discount for a sporting goods store. I
hope the two of you will put it to good use.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Whatever are you doing, Ryan?

text_block_list.name: Incognito Employee
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Incognito Employee
text_block_list.text:
I-I've been found out! But how?! I'm wearing a wig
and everything!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It's painfully obvious who you are!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I've just noticed that Ines and Trainer are
observing us from over there.

text_block_list.name: Ryan & Ines
text_block_list.text: Tactical retreat!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My word! What gives them the right to follow me
around?!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it must be nice being part of such a lively
family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There was probably nothing to worry about in the
first place, but it's nice to catch a quick glimpse
of Ikuno Dictus enjoying herself.
